description: Certain HP LaserJet Pro, HP Enterprise LaserJet, and HP LaserJet Managed Printers are potentially vulnerable to Remote Code Execution due to buffer overflow when rendering fonts embedded in a PDF file.

product.name: Certain LaserJet Pro, HP Enterprise LaserJet, HP LaserJet Managed Printers
Certain LaserJet Pro, HP Enterprise LaserJet, HP LaserJet Managed Printers

enisaIdProduct.product_version: See HP Security Bulletin reference for affected versions.
